articles.title: AU SFB Adopts Intellect's Purple Fabric for AI
articles.description: AU Small Finance Bank has selected Intellect Design Arena's Purple Fabric platform to advance its AI-driven banking processes. The partnership aims to establish a scalable AI foundation, utilizing PF Credit agents for real-time credit assessments. This move supports the bank's goal of becoming an AI-first institution.

articles.title: Every new tool and AI model from Google I/O you can try for free
articles.description: Spoiler: It's a short list this year.
articles.content:
Google just announced a smorgasbord of new AI tools for productivity and creativity at its Google I/O keynote on Tuesday, but not many of them are available for free right now.

articles.title: Grok down, and when will AI chatbot be back up? Grok outage DownDetector data, Grok app and website not working error message, affected regions, users and services
articles.description: Grok down, and when will AI chatbot be back up? Thousands of users reported Grok down issues in the United States on Tuesday evening. Reports on DownDetector showed a rise in complaints from 6 p.m. EDT. Users faced access issues on the app and website. Many users saw the Grok not working error message. The Grok outage affected regions, users and services. People are asking when the AI chatbot will return.
articles.content:

articles.title: AU Small Finance Bank adopts Intellect's Purple Fabric platform
articles.description: AU Small Finance Bank has partnered with Intellect Design Arena to implement the Purple Fabric platform to drive its AI-first banking strategy. The collaboration will utilize AI-powered decision engines to enhance credit assessments and operational efficiency. With a network of over 2,790 touchpoints and strong financial metrics as of March 2026, the bank aims to modernize its commercial banking offerings through scalable enterprise AI.
articles.content: AU Small Finance Bank has collaborated with Intellect Design Arena, a global leader in AI-First, enterprise-grade financial technology, adopting its Purple Fabric platform. The partnership aims to accelerate the bank's journey towards becoming an AI-... [10763 chars]

articles.title: Searching for Cancer Cures Is Part of Google's AI Story. It Deserves to Be More Than a Footnote
articles.description: Commentary: Forget "Ask YouTube." Google should prioritize the AI work it's doing in science.

articles.title: Analog Devices to acquire Empower in $1.5 billion transaction
articles.description: Analog Devices agreed to acquire Empower Semiconductor as the need skyrockets for efficient chips to power data centers required for artificial intelligence.
articles.content:
Analog Devices Inc. agreed to acquire closely held Empower Semiconductor for $1.5 billion in cash as the need skyrockets for efficient chips to power data centers required for artificial intelligence.

articles.title: NTA Overhauls Top Team After NEET-UG 2026 Leak, Posts 4 Senior Officers To Boost Exam Integrity
articles.description: After cancelling NEET-UG 2026 over paper leak claims, NTA appointed 4 senior officers, seeks CTO, CFO, or HR chief, plans AI controls and CBT shift, with re-exam set for June 21 to restore exam integrity.

articles.title: US House foreign affairs chair warns AI sales to China could make America a ‘loser’
articles.description: Brian Mast stressed that American firms must not let the best US technology reach the ‘wrong places’ when it comes to AI industry.

articles.title: H2O.ai launches tabH2O foundation model for tabular data
articles.description: H2O.ai unveiled tabH2O at Dell Technologies World 2026, a foundation model that generates predictions from tabular data in seconds with no model training required.

articles.title: All the Gemini announcements from Google I/O 2026
articles.description: Gemini 3.5, Omni, Spark – Google had a lot to share about "the future of AI."
articles.content:
The Google I/O 2026 keynote is now in the books, and Google had a lot to share. The entire keynote event lasted nearly two hours and was full of new product and feature announcements.
